sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُهِمِّ جِدًّا التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ الْعَمَلِ وَالْحَيَاةِ الشَّخْصِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Veoma je važna ravnoteža između posla i privatnog života.
sentences.translationEn: It is very important to balance work and personal life.

sentences.arabic: تَقْضِي فَاطِمَةُ عُطْلَةَ نِهَايَةِ الْأُسْبُوعِ مَعَ عَائِلَتِهَا فِي الْحَدِيقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Fatima provodi vikend sa svojom porodicom u parku.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima spends the weekend with her family in the park.

sentences.arabic: تُغْلِقُ هَاتِفَهَا الْخَاصَّ بِالْعَمَلِ لِتَشْعُرَ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالِاسْتِرْخَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Gasi svoj poslovni telefon kako bi osjetila mir i opuštanje.
sentences.translationEn: She turns off her work phone to feel comfort and relaxation.
